source: LVSlotPro repo Slots/<slug>/ — edit and run npm run slots:sync

guide_seed.title: Phoenix Link
card_summary_bullets: Must Hit By: Counter / must-hit distance vs cost-per-increment is the primary +EV lens; verify increment and reset on the glass.
Floor / rarity: Very Common — re-verify same visit.
Nerf: Medium — Aristocrat / jurisdictional packaging changes outcomes.
guide_seed.card_ev_threshold: High 1200s → high 1400s depending on bet/denom. Use calculator!

ap.volatility_summary: Beginner play profile; nerf risk rated **Medium** for marketing/paytable drift.
ap.popularity_summary: Floor presence (from seed): **Very Common**. Treat as marketing signal, not proof of edge.
edge_vectors: Counter / must-hit distance vs cost-per-increment is the primary +EV lens; verify increment and reset on the glass.
Average bonus / must-hit pay assumptions dominate — stale assumptions lie.
Walk-away discipline: volatility around the hit window can erase paper EV.
ap.bankroll_angle: Size sessions for worst-case drawdown before the persistent / bonus state pays you back; confirm denom and max-bet rules the same visit you scout.
verification_checklist: Photo: must-hit ceiling, current counter, denom set, max-bet if tied to eligibility.
Confirm marketing progressive vs machine-level caps for this bank.
common_pitfalls: Chasing a 'close' counter with wrong denom or ineligible bet.
Using last month's paytable photo for today's session.
ap.nerf_angle: Nerf risk **Medium**: assume paytables, caps, and marketing can move without notice.
